notes: CAT UTC+02:00; no DST; IANA zone Africa/Lusaka

notes: English official + 7 vernaculars; independence 24 Oct 1964; COMESA member

notes: Assented 23 Mar 2021; commenced 1 Apr 2021; establishes Data Protection Commissioner

title: Cyber Security Act No.3 of 2025 & Cyber Crimes Act No.4 of 2025
notes: Repealed Cyber Security and Cyber Crimes Act No.2 of 2021; primary Act text verification pending

notes: Art 62(1) National Assembly; Arts 162-163 decentralisation by devolution; cited via 8NDP & Parliament

notes: Successor to 7NDP (2017-2021); 4th toward Vision 2030

notes: ZABS mandate to develop Zambian National Standards; under Ministry of Commerce Trade & Industry

title: Mining Cadastre (Ministry of Mines) & eGov Portal
notes: Trimble Landfolio; portal.miningcadastre.com; ZIMIS; under Mines and Minerals Development Act

notes: NRC primary ID issued at 16+; Dept of National Registration Passport & Citizenship

notes: LLL NNNN format since 2000; RTSA registration; country code Z

title: Ministries & Cabinet (Cabinet Office)
notes: Ministries directory; corroborated by Cabinet of Zambia list (as of Mar 2025)

title: Engineering Institution of Zambia Act No. 17 of 2010
notes: Statutory professional regulator of engineering; EIZ Act No.17 of 2010 s.3

title: Statistics Act No. 13 of 2018
notes: Establishes ZamStats and national statistical system; primary Act text verification pending

title: Preliminary Annual GDP 2024
notes: Real GDP grew 4.0% (2024) vs 5.4% (2023); current-price GDP K688851m (2024) vs K557406m (2023)

title: Zambia Macro Poverty Outlook / Economic brief
notes: Growth factor-cost 5.7% 2023/2.0% 2024e; int'l poverty $2.15 ~63.7% 2023; inflation 10.9%/15.0%; FDI; fiscal

title: Zambia GDP by sector (World Bank via Statista)
notes: 2023 Agriculture 2.2%; Industry 35.1%; Services 56.8%; mining ~14.3% (2023)

title: 2022 Census of Population & Housing (Preliminary)
notes: Population 19610769 (de facto 8 Sep 2022); male 9603056 female 10007713; households 4056605; density 26.1/km2; avg hh 4.8

title: 2022 Living Conditions Monitoring Survey (LCMS)
notes: Poverty 60% (rural 78.8% urban 31.9%; extreme 48%); LF participation 31.4%; unemployment 13.1%; agri employment 37.2%; hh income rural K2112 urban K5547

title: The Monthly Bulletin Vol 273 Dec 2025 (CPI)
notes: Annual inflation 11.2% Dec 2025; provincial inflation range Luapula 6.8% to Western 15.2%

title: Monetary Policy Report 2026
notes: Inflation 7.1% Mar 2026 (from 11.2% Dec 2025); 6.8% April; target band 6-8%; policy rate 14.25%(context)

title: Zambia Economic brief - labour (World Bank)
notes: Labour force participation ~35%; employment-to-population ~31%; unemployment rose in 2024 among youth/women/rural

title: Zambia economic context / agriculture & drought
notes: Copper main export; only ~15% arable potential cultivated; 2024 drought cereal 1.9Mt (-43%); maize 1.6Mt (~-50%)

title: Zambia installed electricity generation capacity
notes: Installed capacity 3871.32 MW (2024) up from 3811.32 MW (2023); hydro 82% coal 9% solar 5% HFO/diesel

title: National Energy Compact for Zambia
notes: Peak demand ~2500MW; generation fell to ~1019MW Aug 2024 (drought); transmission 12705 km 2023; rural grid connection 5.6%; target +6200MW by 2030

title: Overview of Private Sector Participation in Zambia Energy
notes: National electricity access 53.9% (2023 survey; urban 80% rural 34%); Rural Electrification Act No.5 of 2023; capacity fell to ~1225MW in drought

title: Zambia Core Road Network (RDA)
notes: Total classified road network 67671 km; Core Road Network 40454 km (per RDA; primary doc to confirm)

title: ZICTA 2024 Annual Market Report (reported)
notes: Mobile subs 23.2M (2024) from 21.1M (2023); internet subs 13.5M; towers 3626; sites 14519; mobile-money txn volume +33%; GCI 92.6%

title: Digital 2024 Zambia
notes: Internet users 6.51M (31.2% penetration); mobile connections 16.40M (78.7%); CONTRADICTS ZICTA penetration figure

title: Freedom on the Net 2024 - Zambia
notes: ZICTA Dec 2023: 12.6M internet users (64.1% penetration); fixed-line 99000; 5G launched 2022-2023; 2G/3G phase-out to 4G

title: FinScope Zambia 2020 Survey Report
notes: Financial inclusion 69.4% (6.6M of 9.5M adults); formal 61.3%; mobile money 58.4% (from 14% 2015); excluded 30.6%

title: Zambia Insurance Industry Survey (PwC)
notes: 33 registered insurers; penetration 1.4% of GDP (2020); below African avg ~2.78%

title: VPoA Zambia Progress Report 2024 (transport corridors)
notes: Corridors: North-South Dar-es-Salaam Beira Nacala Walvis-Bay(Ndola-Lubumbashi) Lobito Central; OSBPs Chirundu Nakonde Kasumbalesa Kazungula Mwami; Kazungula Bridge 2021

title: Zambia agro-ecological zones & climate profile
notes: AER I <800mm (12% land); AER II 800-1000mm (IIa/IIb); AER III 1000-1500mm (46% land); growing seasons 80-160 days

title: Drought Management in Zambia 2023/2024 + FAO drought portal
notes: National emergency 29 Feb 2024; 84 of 116 districts; rainfall 35-45% below 1991-2020 mean; Lake Kariba fell to 2.89% capacity

title: FAO drought portal - Zambia river basins
notes: Six major river basins: Tanganyika Chambeshi Luapula Luangwa Kafue Zambezi (within Zambezi & Congo transboundary basins)
